svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: var(--ge-adaptive-bg, #ffffff); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="agentic-review-flow" name="Agentic Review Flow"> <mxGraphModel dx="2020" dy="1086" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1020" pageHeight="430" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1f2933;" value="Agentic clinical data review — controls turned up" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="600" x="210" y="14" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="subtitle" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=13;fontColor=#5b6770;" value="<font style="font-size: 16px;">Built and judged against expert-annotated cases</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="500" x="260" y="48" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#f1f7e6;strokeColor=#76b900;fontColor=#1f2933;fontSize=13;" value="<font style="font-size: 15px;">Assemble records</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="150" x="15" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#c5cdd5;fontColor=#1f2933;fontSize=13;" value="<font style="font-size: 15px;">Check vs. protocol</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="150" x="183" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#c5cdd5;fontColor=#1f2933;fontSize=13;" value="<font style="font-size: 15px;">Draft the query</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="150" x="351" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#fbeed8;strokeColor=#e6932b;fontColor=#1f2933;fontSize=13;" value="<font style="font-size: 15px;"><b>Self-critique gate</b><br></font><span style="color: rgb(181, 112, 26);"><font style="font-size: 12px;">is this supported?</font></span>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="150" x="519" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#e3f1f3;strokeColor=#2f8f9d;fontColor=#1f2933;fontSize=13;" value="<font style="font-size: 15px;">Human review ✓</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="150" x="687" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#eaf3d6;strokeColor=#76b900;fontColor=#1f2933;fontSize=13;" value="<font style="font-size: 15px;">Query raised</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="150" x="855" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a1" edge="1" parent="1" source="n1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#7b8794;" target="n2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a2" edge="1" parent="1" source="n2" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#7b8794;" target="n3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a3" edge="1" parent="1" source="n3" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#7b8794;" target="n4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a4" edge="1" parent="1" source="n4" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#7b8794;" target="n5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a5" edge="1" parent="1" source="n5" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#7b8794;" target="n6"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;fontColor=#b5701a;" value="<font style="font-size: 13px;">catches weak reasoning first</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="150" x="519" y="86" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="trace" parent="1" style="rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#f5f7f9;strokeColor=#c5cdd5;fontColor=#5b6770;fontSize=14;" value="<font style="font-size: 16px;">Trace every step — replayable for audit</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="990" x="15" y="212" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="monitor" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#7b8794;dashed=1;strokeWidth=3;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="960" y="300" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="70" y="300" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="monlabel" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=13;fontColor=#5b6770;" value="<font style="font-size: 16px;">Monitor in production — same evaluation, watching for drift</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="500" x="260" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
